items.title: Scrubbit 0.3.4
items.description: Smarter entity extraction, enhanced Review page with search and collapsible categories, and improved Ollama connection handling.

items.title: Did you know? Decode Mode
items.description: Paste anonymized text and decode it back using your project glossary.

items.title: Chat with anonymized docs
items.description: Ask questions about your documents while keeping all PII redacted.
